sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106418" key="u(dromantei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρο-μαντεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n106418.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">water-divination,</tr_> Augustin.<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">De Civ.Dei</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:7:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.35</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
